feedback.text: I have recommendations on act 6. 7. and 8. 6. Preventing publishers of any kind of digital media (including but not limited to, movies, e-books, music tracks and video games) arbitrarily making copies they have already sold to customers inaccessible and/or unplayable in any way. 7. Prevention of payment processors from blocking digital storefronts from carrying content they consider "violent", establishing firmly that their role is strictly to process payments, and not deciding whether or not the content is appropriate. 8. Prevention of video game companies stealing and selling personal data such as (age,name,surname, location of residence and est)
